awards.name: First Step
awards.description: Completed your very first daily task session.

awards.name: Steady speaker
awards.description: Completed your first(15) ever Conversation Mode session.

awards.name: Steady Reader
awards.description: Completed your first (15)ever Read Aloud session.

awards.name: High Five
awards.description: Completed at least one session of all 5 exercises.

awards.name: Iron Will
awards.description: Completed 30 total timed exercise sessions.

awards.name: Page Turner
awards.description: Accumulated 60 minutes total across Read Aloud sessions.

awards.name: Chatterbox
awards.description: Accumulated 100 minutes total across Conversation Mode sessions.

awards.name: Welcome Back
awards.description: Resumed your streak after a gap of 3 or more days.

awards.name: Iron Discipline
awards.description: Achieved a 14-day streak by completing all 5 daily tasks every day.

awards.name: God Mode
awards.description: Achieved a 30-day streak by completing all 5 daily tasks every day.

awards.name: Week Warrior
awards.description: Achieved a 7-day streak by completing all 5 daily tasks every day this week.

awards.name: Flawless Week
awards.description: Completed all 5 daily tasks every single day for 7 consecutive days.

awards.name: Goal Crusher
awards.description: Hit all 3 daily goals — Exercise, Reading, and Conversation — in a single day.

awards.name: The Invincible
awards.description: Hit all 3 daily goals — Exercise, Reading, and Conversation — for 7 consecutive days.

awards.name: Early Bird
awards.description: Completed all 5 daily tasks before 9 AM.

awards.name: First Strike
awards.description: Kicked off the week by completing your first practice session on Monday.

awards.name: Breath Control
awards.description: Completed 5 breathing or airflow exercises in a single week.

awards.name: Speech Grinder
awards.description: Completed 10 or more speech exercises within a single week.

awards.name: Reading Champ
awards.description: Completed a Read Aloud session for 5 days in a week.

awards.name: Speaking Champ
awards.description: Completed a Conversation Mode session for 5 days in a week.
